user.title: Choose Backend
user.description: Select which AI backend to use for conversation.

github.title: GitHub Authentication
github.description: Choose how to sign in to GitHub Models.

copilot_cli.title: Copilot CLI Connection
copilot_cli.description: Connect to the GitHub Copilot CLI add-on's ACP server. The add-on must be installed and running with `enable_conversation_agent` enabled.

data_description.acp_host: Hostname of the Copilot CLI add-on (auto-detected when running in HA)
data_description.acp_port: TCP port the ACP server listens on (default: 3000)

github_device.title: Sign in with GitHub
github_device.description:
1. Open **[{url}]({url})** in your browser
2. Enter the code: **{code}**
3. Authorize the application
4. Click **Submit** below

github_model.title: Select Model
github_model.description: GitHub authentication successful! Choose which AI model to use.

data_description.model: The fast model used for all requests. Select the fastest model available for orchestration.
data_description.expert_model: A powerful model for complex reasoning. The fast model will escalate hard questions here. Leave empty to disable.

github_pat.title: Personal Access Token
github_pat.description:
Enter a GitHub Personal Access Token with `models:read` permission.

[Create a fine-grained PAT](https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new)

data_description.model: The fast model used for all requests. Select the fastest model available for orchestration.
data_description.expert_model: A powerful model for complex reasoning. The fast model will escalate hard questions here. Leave empty to disable.

azure.title: Azure AI Endpoint
azure.description: Enter your Azure AI endpoint URL and API key.

data_description.azure_endpoint: The full URL of your Azure AI chat completions endpoint

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your token or API key.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the API. Check the endpoint and try again.
error.not_yet_authorized: Not authorized yet. Complete the steps above in your browser, then click Submit again.

abort.device_flow_failed: GitHub sign-in failed or expired. Please try again.

init.title: Options
init.description: Update your API credentials or model selection.

user.title: New Conversation Agent
user.description: Create a new conversation agent with custom settings.

data_description.title: Display name for this conversation agent
data_description.llm_hass_api: Which HA APIs should this agent have access to (e.g., Assist for entity control)
data_description.expert_model: Override the expert model for this agent. Leave empty to use the integration-level expert model.
data_description.prompt: Custom system prompt to override the default. Leave empty for the default prompt.
data_description.max_tokens: Maximum number of tokens in the response
